logoChoice.title: Do you already have a logo?
logoChoice.subtitle: You can import your existing logo or let our AI create one for you

import.title: I already have a logo
import.description: Upload your existing logo file. We'll optimize it and convert it to a clean vector format.

ai.title: Create with AI
ai.description: Let our AI generate unique logo concepts based on your project's identity.

logoChoice.colorsUsedAsPrimary: These colors will be used as primary colors. Our AI will propose complementary palettes.
logoChoice.generatingBrandingSubtitle: Our AI is creating color palettes and typography sets based on your logo.

postImport.title: Your logo is ready. What would you like to do with it?

useAsIs.title: Use as is
useAsIs.description: Keep your logo exactly as it is. Its variations (light background, dark background, monochrome) are generated automatically.

improve.title: Improve with AI
improve.description: AI analyzes your logo and generates more professional versions that stay true to your identity (shapes, colors, symbolism).

postImport.analysisError: Logo analysis failed. Try again or use your logo as is.
